name: interactive-html
description: Comment on any HTML page — an AI agent applies the change and the page updates in front of you. Plus a sibling skill that generates polished, self-contained HTML to comment on.

plugins.name: interactive-html
plugins.description: Turn any folder of static HTML into a live commenting surface. Highlight text, pick an element, drag a region, or ask a question; the agent reads the comment, edits the HTML, and the page reloads with a tour of what changed.

plugins.name: html-designer
plugins.description: Generate a polished, self-contained HTML page from a description or content — semantic markup, design tokens, mandatory light/dark, inline-SVG diagrams, zero network dependencies — then offer to make it interactive.
